---
name: Feature request
about: Feature or function you would like to see added to spike? Please describe it here.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**What would you like to see added to `spike`?**
Please describe the proposed feature/function. If you are proposing the addition of a telescope/observatory, please point to both the data processing pipeline and any instrument-specific PSF models.

**Description of overlap with existing codes:**
Please note here if the proposed feature duplicates the behavior of any other software. If there are similar codes that don't cover your use case, please elaborate on that as well.

**Description of any preliminary work:**
If you've thought about or worked on how to implement the proposed feature, but not to the extent that you would want to open a PR, please share any preliminary efforts here. If you've hit any specific challenges in integrating the proposed feature into `spike`, please describe them here.

**Any other pertinent information:**
